files.patch:
@@ -2179,0 +2179,5 @@
+# 0: string
+# lint: serial
+compiler.warn.ineffectual.serial.method.value.class=\
+    serialization-related method ''{0}'' is not effective in a value class
+

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+/*

+ * 2 along with this work; if not, write to the Free Software Foundation,
+ * Inc., 51 Franklin St, Fifth Floor, Boston, MA 02110-1301 USA.
+ *
+ * Please contact Oracle, 500 Oracle Parkway, Redwood Shores, CA 94065 USA

+ * questions.

+
+// key: compiler.warn.ineffectual.serial.method.value.class
+// key: compiler.note.preview.filename
+// key: compiler.note.preview.recompile
+
+// options: --enable-preview -source ${jdk.version} -Xlint:serial
+
+import java.io.*;
+
+value class IneffectualInValueClass implements Serializable {
+    private static final long serialVersionUID = 0;
+
+    private void writeObject(ObjectOutputStream stream) throws IOException {}
+
+    protected Object writeReplace() throws ObjectStreamException {
+        return null;
+    }
+}
